title: grafana security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[10.2.6-21]
- Resolves RHEL-125631: CVE-2025-58183
- Resolves RHEL-132760: Grafana-selinux prevents plugins from searching cgroups
full_text:
